text:
specialty code of the rendering 
physician/practitioner (identified using the NPI) whose services qualify for an incentive bonus under 
the Primary Care Incentive Payment Program (PCIP). 

SHORT NAME: RNDRNG_PHYSN_SPCLTY_CD 

LONG NAME: RNDRNG_PHYSN_SPCLTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 00 = Carrier wide 
01 = General practice 
02 = General surgery 
03 = Allergy/immunology 
04 = Otolaryngology 
05 = Anesthesiology 
06 = Cardiology 
07 = Dermatology 
08 = Family practice 
09
